title: US job openings tick up in sign of steady labor demand
description:
Available positions ticked up to 7.59 million last month, slightly above the revised April level, according to Bureau of Labor Statistics data out Tuesday.

description:

title: Consumer confidence ticks up, but Americans remain gloomy about economy
description:
Americans' attitudes toward the economy improved slightly this month as gas prices declined, but their outlook is still mostly negative by historical standards.

title: Deaconess Health names new CFO
description:
Evansville-based Deaconess Health System has selected Alice Rigdon to serve as its next chief financial officer, the health system announced Monday.

title: Report: Indiana leads nation in decline of children insured through Medicaid
description:
